caption: A person's hand holds a small, white and yellow plastic electrical connector against a background that appears to be the interior of a vehicle, featuring tan fabric and dark plastic trim. The person's fingers grip the small component, rotating and manipulating it slightly to show different angles. As the sequence progresses, the hand shifts its grip, moving the connector closer to the fingertip and tilting it slightly. The background remains consistent throughout the action, showing a textured tan surface and a dark plastic panel above it. No other people, clothing, on-screen text, or logos are visible in the scene. The movement is subtle, focusing entirely on the detailed inspection of the small plastic part held between the thumb and fingers.
